segment.source: Renders a horizontal navigation row of legal page links, each with a label and link target, joined by a configurable separator (dot, pipe, slash, or none) and carrying an accessible aria label. Use it for: footer link rows to privacy policy, terms, imprint, and cookie policy found at the bottom of source sites. Prefer 'Minimal Footer' when a copyright line is also needed; 'Site Footer' for a full footer.
